'''yasama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okry|okry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okry|okry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yasama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || yæsæmæth || yæsæmæj || yæsæmæsh || yæsæmæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || yasasamath || yasasamaj || yasasamash || yasasama
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || yasamath || yasamaj || yasamash || yasama
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || yasafmafth || yasafmafj || yasafmafsh || yasafmaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || yasamatha || yasamaja || yasamasha || yasamaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || yasamath || yasamaj || yasamash || yasama
|-
| [[Possessive]] || yasamathal || yasamajal || yasamashal || yasamakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || yasamaathatha || yasamaajaja || yasamaashasha || yasamaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || yasamathan || yasamajan || yasamashan || yasamakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || yasamathaoro || yasamajaoro || yasamashaoro || yasamakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
